Name: Day 12 | NFX | Gigi Levy-Weiss
Description:
**FUND OVERVIEW**
Fund: NFX
AUM: $1B+ (multi-fund platform)
Stage: Pre-seed to Seed
Check Size: $500K - $5M
Geographic Focus: Global (San Francisco HQ, Israel, Europe, LatAm)

**PARTNER DETAILS**
Name: Gigi Levy-Weiss
Title: General Partner & Co-Founder
Email: gigi@nfx.com

**GAMING/AI THESIS**
NFX is a seed-stage venture firm that believes AI games represent the next major platform shift in interactive entertainment. Co-founded by Gigi Levy-Weiss (former CEO of Playtika, sold for $4.4B) and James Currier, NFX brings deep operational gaming expertise combined with AI infrastructure conviction. Their explicit thesis, articulated in 'AI Games Are Coming' and 'The Next Era of Gaming and AI' publications, centers on generative AI enabling entirely new game genres, dynamic content generation, and AI-native gameplay mechanics. They invest in gaming infrastructure, AI-powered game development tools, and studios building the next generation of interactive experiences.

**FIT SCORE:** 91/100

**NOTABLE INVESTMENTS**
- Playtika (Gigi founded, $4.4B exit to Chinese consortium)
- Plarium (mobile gaming, acquired for $500M+)
- Moon Active (Coin Master, $2.5B valuation)
- Papaya Gaming (mobile gaming)
- Superplay (mobile gaming studio)
- Oriel Bachar (transforming single-player games into multiplayer tournaments)

**WHY THIS FUND FITS NEXUS AI**
NFX demonstrates strong alignment with NEXUS AI's vision. Their Pre-seed to Seed focus and $500K - $5M check size range matches our fundraising targets. **GAMING/AI THESIS**
Moonfire is an AI-native VC firm that uses proprietary LLMs and ML-powered sourcing to identify breakthrough companies. Founded by Mattias Ljungman (co-founder of Atomico), they explicitly invest in gaming as one of five core sectors. Their 'golden triangle' framework seeks companies providing greater access, efficiency, and service-quality—all while leveraging data. For gaming, they focus on AI-powered development tools, infrastructure enabling dynamic game worlds, and platforms that democratize game creation. Their AI-first approach to venture itself demonstrates technical depth in the infrastructure they back.

Their thesis centers on the CEE region's technical talent (CD Projekt, Techland heritage) applied to next-generation gaming experiences. They've backed multiple game studios including Exit Plan Games (founded by ex-CD Projekt leads) and Nibble Games. Name: Kevin Brown
Title: Founder & Managing Partner
Email: kevin@remagineventures.com

**GAMING/AI THESIS**
Remagine Ventures is a seed and pre-seed firm investing in how consumers spend time and money online, with a spotlight on Israel. Since 2018, they've focused on being first-check investors in ambitious founders building the future of gaming, Metaverse, and AI. Their portfolio spans 'AI agents and applications—from gaming and media to financial operations' as well as the infrastructure powering them. They don't do healthcare, cyber, or defense—instead focusing where AI meets the digital economy. Their recent investments include Troup AI (AI infrastructure) and Keewano.com (gaming analytics agent), demonstrating active AI-gaming thesis.
